message.loginSubtitle: Upload invoices and submit reimbursement forms with ease
message.uploadLoginHint: Students and teachers can sign in to upload invoices and submit reimbursement forms.
message.processLoginHint: Administrators can sign in to review, filter, and download submitted forms.
message.uploadHomeHint: Upload invoices and manage your reimbursement forms here.
message.adminHomeHint: Review forms by business category, filter, and download attachments as ZIP.

form.accountPlaceholder: Enter student ID, employee ID, or admin account

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

error.loginFailed: Sign-in failed. Please check your account and password.
error.uploadRoleMismatch: This account cannot upload invoices. Switch to process sign-in.
error.processRoleMismatch: This account cannot process invoices. Switch to upload sign-in.
